name: cosmos-cosmic-adventure-2026
description: Cosmos Cosmic Adventure 2026 — 2.5D psychedelische browser-platformer remake van Cosmo's Cosmic Adventure (Apogee, 1992)

scripts.build: npm run updates:build && tsc --noEmit && vite build && node scripts/postbuild-rewrite-paths.mjs && node scripts/postbuild-copy-public.mjs
scripts.predeploy: npm run typecheck && npm run build
